scope: ACL 2027 supplement page-4 claim-boundary companion v2 visual iteration

motivation.target_page_before: After the first-page v2 pass, the round-9 full supplement density audit made page 4 the lowest non-reference page.
motivation.goal_alignment: Use more registered render/media examples in the page-4 overview while keeping the boundary-marker AI slot exposition-only.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 238, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks.
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, used for sparse-page raster review.
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90.

claim_boundary.paper_use: visual reading guide for the overview's negative claim boundary
claim_boundary.notes: The v2 boundary-marker AI slot is not a render result, metric, VLM output, navigation run, benchmark row, or new evidence source. The evidence-bearing cards and exclusion-to-render ladder reuse registered proxy, GRScenes, material-effect, and InternNav media.

boundary_marker_v2.role: AI-generated boundary-marker schematic only; deterministic code draws all paper-critical labels and claim-boundary text.

final_figure.local_visual_evidence: The standalone v2 card is taller than v1, adds a registered exclusion-to-render ladder, expands the proxy/VLM/material/navigation lanes to three tiles each, and keeps the AI marker in a separated exposition-only card.

pdf_review.local_visual_evidence: Rendered page 4 now uses much more of the right column for the overview companion while retaining a readable caption and without creating a spill page. Page 5 remains a coherent full claim-boundary examples page, and page 6 starts the render atlas normally.

layout_iterations.change: Updated regression tests to require the v2 AI slot source, a 920x1000-plus dense figure, a 0.40 textheight include cap, and the registered exclusion-to-render ladder phrase.
layout_iterations.result: RED first: focused page-4 tests failed on the old caption/source registry and old v1 slot.

layout_iterations.change: Generated and registered a v2 boundary-marker AI slot.
layout_iterations.result: Selected: the slot is text-free enough for deterministic relabeling and remains exposition only.

layout_iterations.change: Rebuilt the page-4 companion at 920x1040 with three-tile gate cards and a registered exclusion-to-render ladder.
layout_iterations.result: Selected: page-4 active245 at 90 dpi rises from 0.12636443 to 0.153922637 while the supplement remains 45 A4 pages.

tests.result: RED before implementation: 2 failed, 72 deselected; GREEN after implementation: 2 passed, 72 deselected.
completed; regenerated fig_supplement_page4_claim_boundary_companion.png from the v2 composer.
completed during layout review; paper/venues/acl27/build/supplement.pdf contains 45 A4 pages.
completed; pages 3-6 regenerated for local visual review.
completed; pages 3-6 regenerated for density review.
GREEN in the final verification pass: 74 passed.

tests.command: final figure, PDF text, PDF profile, git diff whitespace, and direct final-newline/trailing-whitespace scans
tests.result: exit 0; figure size is 920x1040, figure layout-guard active fraction is 0.423647575, page-4 required caption phrases are present, local-path and author-name leakage checks passed, and touched text files have no trailing whitespace.

review_mode.reason: Local pure visual review was used; no separate clean-room subagent was dispatched because the available subagent tool requires an explicit user request for delegation.
